heading: Big Hole National Battlefield; redesignation of monument
label: 430uu Big Hole National Battlefield; redesignation of monument
text: The Big Hole Battlefield National Monument, established by Executive Order Numbered 1216 of , and enlarged by Proclamation Numbered 2339 of , is hereby redesignated as the Big Hole National Battlefield.June 23, 1910June 29, 1939
notes: References in TextExecutive Order Numbered 1216 of , referred to in text, is not classified to the Code.June 23, 1910Proclamation Numbered 2339 of (), referred to in text, is not classified to the Code.June 29, 193953 Stat. 2544
